wire.label: WHO IS EQUIPILATES?
wire.title: Equipilates Europe is a European operation with local manufacturing in Spain, combining European standards with proven global Pilates expertise.
wire.classicText: Absolute fidelity to Joseph Pilates' original method. Our classic line uses exact measurements and calibrated springs to ensure pure biomechanics, ideal for studios that prioritize tradition and technical results.
wire.contempText: Innovation and versatility for today's fitness market. Our contemporary line offers quick adjustments and advanced ergonomics, perfect for dynamic studios seeking high student flow and maximum durability.

values.item1.title: Opening Your First Studio
values.item1.text: We've set up over 35,000 studios in 25 countries. Our team guides you from layout to the ideal kit for your budget. Start with equipment that maximizes your investment.
values.item1.cta: I Want to Build My Studio →
values.item2.title: Expanding or Renovating
values.item2.text: Time to grow? Worn-out equipment? We do smart upgrades and planned expansions. Switch to Equipilates quality and increase your studio's capacity.

classica.label: PILATES EQUIPMENT
classica.title: Classic Line:
classica.subtitle: Pilates equipment developed with Joseph Pilates' exact measurements. Pure biomechanics, noble materials and millimetric precision for studios that value tradition.

classica.slide1.text: The heart of the Pilates method with high-precision aluminum rails.
classica.slide2.title: Aluminum Cadillac
classica.slide2.text: Maximum versatility with a premium aluminum frame.
classica.slide3.title: Electric Chair
classica.slide3.text: Challenge and precision for advanced method exercises.
classica.slide4.title: Arm Chair
classica.slide4.text: Focused upper-body work with full control.
classica.slide5.title: Ladder Barrel
classica.slide5.text: Flexibility and stretching with the perfect curve.
classica.slide6.title: Guillotine

classica.slide8.title: Mat

classica.slide9.title: Portable Mat

classica.slide10.title: Bench Mat

warranty.label: PILATES EQUIPMENT WITH WARRANTY
warranty.title: Quality
warranty.subtitle: Equipilates Europe Pilates equipment is produced with rigorous quality control in our European operation. Each apparatus is developed to deliver performance, safety and consistent return for your studio.
warranty.card1.title: premium warranty
warranty.card1.desc: Full factory coverage for structure, springs and mechanical components of Pilates equipment.
warranty.card2.title: complete coverage
warranty.card2.desc: Extended warranty including all natural wear parts of your Pilates equipment.
warranty.card3.title: comfort warranty
warranty.card3.desc: Special protection for upholstery and cushions of Pilates equipment against manufacturing defects.
warranty.ctaSub: Clear your doubts and learn all the benefits

origin.label: THE FOUNDER'S DNA
origin.title: Equipment Designed by Someone Who
origin.text1: Founded in 2006 by physiotherapist Rafael Iazpeck, Equipilates was born from a real need and today operates globally with a structured European operation focused on the EU market.
origin.text2: Unlike other brands, our Pilates Equipment is not just designed by engineers. It's developed by someone who understands the human body, movement and rehabilitation.
origin.highlight: Pilates equipment designed by a physiotherapist, manufactured with technical rigor and total respect for Joseph Pilates' legacy.
line.classica.label: CLASSIC LINE
line.classica.title: Tradition with Precision
line.classica.text: Exact original measurements, pure biomechanics and noble materials. Ideal for purist instructors and studios that value faithful practice and profound results.
line.classica.feature1: Certified Solid Wood or high-quality Stainless Steel
line.classica.feature3: Perfect for rehabilitation and traditional teaching
line.classica.feature4: Reformer, Cadillac, Chair and Barrel with original measurements
line.contemp.label: CONTEMPORARY LINE
line.contemp.title: Practical Innovation
line.contemp.text: Robust design with current solutions: quick adjustments, advanced ergonomics and resistance for intense class flow and larger groups.
line.contemp.feature1: Lyptus Wood (sustainable reforestation) and Nautical Vinyl
line.contemp.feature4: Ideal for dynamic studios and larger groups

testimonials.label: TESTIMONIALS
testimonials.title: The Most Desired Brand
testimonials.subtitle: Thousands of Pilates studios trust Equipilates to equip their spaces with professional quality. See what our clients have to say about our excellence.
testimonials.social1.name: Juliana Ferreira
testimonials.social1.text: I bought an Equipilates reformer about three and a half years ago... it still looks brand new! My studio has 15 regular clients, it runs all day, and the machine has zero issues. The finish still looks great, the springs are perfect. Honestly, worth every penny.
testimonials.social2.name: Dr. Roberto Almeida
testimonials.social2.text: I've been a physiotherapist for 18 years and have worked with several equipment brands. When I set up my own space, I chose Equipilates without hesitation. The difference is in the details: the carriage glides smoothly, adjustments are precise, and the wood is the real deal.
testimonials.social3.name: Patrícia Duarte
testimonials.social3.text: I bought the aluminum Cadillac last year — wow, what a machine! I insisted on the classic line because I work a lot with rehab. The frame is rock-solid, no wobble even during intense exercises. After-sales support is excellent.
testimonials.social4.name: Marcos Vinícius
testimonials.social4.text: I'll be honest: I hesitated at first because of the investment. But after 2 years using Equipilates equipment in my studio, I can say it was the best decision. Zero maintenance so far, clients love them!
testimonials.social5.name: Carla Mendonça
testimonials.social5.text: I teach authentic classical Pilates and have always been picky about equipment. When I discovered Equipilates' classic line, I fell in love. The dimensions are true to the original method, build quality is flawless. My Ladder Barrel is functional art!
testimonials.social6.name: Amanda Costa
testimonials.social6.text: I opened a boutique studio and wanted gear that was durable but also beautiful. Equipilates delivered exactly that. The contemporary reformer looks modern, adjustments are quick, and the wood with aluminum looks elegant.
testimonials.social7.name: Renata Oliveira
testimonials.social7.text: After 4 years with another brand that kept failing, I switched everything to Equipilates. What a difference! Incredible quality plus financing made it easier. I use them hard — classes from 6 a.m. to 9 p.m. The equipment holds up!
testimonials.social8.name: Felipe Barros
testimonials.social8.text: I've worked with fitness equipment distribution for years. When I discovered Equipilates, I was impressed by the quality standard and finishing. Market acceptance has been excellent, and clients return for additional purchases or referrals.
testimonials.social9.name: Beatriz Santos
testimonials.social9.text: I'm trained in the classical method and I'm picky about technical details. Equipilates' Chair amazed me with the precision of dimensions and stability. I can run the full original sequence with confidence. The upholstery is super comfortable!
faq.label: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.title: Questions About Pilates Equipment
faq.q1: What's the difference between Reformer and Cadillac?
faq.a1: The Reformer is the most well-known Pilates equipment, with sliding carriage and adjustable springs. The Cadillac (also called Trap Table) is a vertical structure with bars, springs and accessories, ideal for exercises in different positions. Both are essential in a complete studio.
faq.q2: How long does Pilates equipment last?
faq.a2: With quality materials like stainless steel, certified solid wood and proper maintenance, our Pilates equipment lasts for decades. We offer a 2-year warranty for equipment and 3 months for accessories, plus lifetime technical assistance.
faq.q3: How to choose between Classic and Contemporary Line?
faq.a3: The Classic Line follows Joseph Pilates' exact original measurements, ideal for purist instructors and rehabilitation. The Contemporary Line offers more versatility and quick adjustments, perfect for studios with intense flow and larger groups.
faq.q4: Which countries does Equipilates export to?
faq.a4: We export Pilates equipment to over 25 countries, including the United States, France, United Kingdom, South Korea, Portugal, Spain, Germany and other demanding markets.
faq.q5: Where is Equipilates Europe's manufacturing operation located?
faq.a5: Our European operation is based in Yecla, Murcia, Spain (Carretera Valencia km 0, 30510 Yecla), with local production and rigorous quality control.
faq.a6: Our equipment includes a 2-year warranty directly from our European operation. Accessories have a 3-month warranty, with specialized technical support across the European Union.
faq.a7: We work with flexible installment plans up to 24x on the website and special conditions up to 36x for direct purchases.
faq.q8: Does Equipilates Europe serve the entire European Union?
faq.a8: Yes. We serve the entire European Union with structured logistics, fast delivery and local technical support.
faq.q9: How to receive a personalized quote?
faq.a9: Contact us via our commercial WhatsApp, available 24/7. Our European team will help you define the ideal project.
